target: 25. Isn't It the Tide Itself?

S-sorry!
Let me through, please!

(Damn… That guy…
Hurry up and run off already…)

(Do you even understand the situation?!
I just finished my own funeral, you know…)

Ah! Shinpei!
I wanna try yo-yo fishing!!
…Whoa…You…!!!

You idiot!!!
You're way too noticeable!!!

You're the one who's noticeable!
You're shouting so loud!

Ah, by the way,
don't you think it smells really good?
It's definitely from takoyaki!!

Now's not the time!!!
What if someone we know sees us?!
How am I supposed to explain you?!!!
Come here!!!

(Anyway…
Why is this guy in a swimsuit all of a sudden?!!)

Hey Shinpei!
Why are you hiding here?
I'm hungry…

Mio and the others are here too, right?
I wanna see them!!!
No way, absolutely not!!!

You…
Think about the situation more carefully…
I had a funeral yesterday!!!
But…

No way!
You're a shadow---

I don't know if it's a ghost or not, but…
Everyone can see you!!!

You even have a body!
What the hell are you?!
So… you mean I can't meet everyone?
Of course I am!!!
Mmm…

Anyway, until the festival ends,
hide here---
Shinpei's <color=#GF_TIPS_056>clumsy</color>---!!!
Gh…?!

Stop making all that noise!!!
I'll twist your mouth!!!
(You already moved your hand before speaking!!!)

(But… this reaction…
It's exactly like the tide…)

(I am the shadow of this tide---
I'm talking to Ushio)

(The two years I spent away from the island, and
stories about old memories…)
(Ushio's memories were accurate)

(It seems the shadow can copy not just appearance,
but also personality, consciousness, and memories)
(However---)
You remember the novelist I like?

Ryunosuke Nagumo!
I went to see the movie!
…I wonder what happened to Shiori?

Eh…?
What happened to Shiori?

(For some reason, memories about shadows
completely disappeared)

(The story about Mio seeing a shadow,
and the beach day…)
(I also didn't remember how I died)

(It didn't look like an act to me.
"Truly not knowing"…that expression…)
…No, it's nothing…
Phone?
Yeah… Mio…
Lend it to me!!!

Ah!!!
Wait---
Hello? Mio?!

Y-you idiot!!!
Give it back!!!

Hi, this is me!
It's me!

M-Mio?! It's me!!!
Hi!!!
Eh, um…

Now…
I thought I heard my sister's voice…

That's impossible!!!
D-d'you okay?

…Yeah, I guess…
I'm probably going crazy…

Shin-chan, where are you now?
The fireworks are over, and the sea send-off has started.
We're in the shrine grounds now.

Ah, sorry!!!
I'm nearby, I'll come right away.

…Really?
Then hurry back.
Everyone's worried.

Yeah, I got it.
I'll dash over…
Well, see you.
Haaa…
Mio, what did you say?!

Just shut up!!!
You… don't come out!!!

W-wait, wait!!!
Don't push me like that!!!

I'll come pick you up later!!!
Stay hidden here for a while!!!
…Huh.

You don't know, but…
Something really serious is happening right now---

You said it…
You told me to protect Mio…
Huh?
I won't regret it.
…I don't get it.
I didn't say anything like that---
